text:
Created attachment 218710
homura-5.2.diff

Hello,

an update to Homura to version to 5.2

Changes:
- Added a small check if the library is empty
- Added a small check if an internet connection exists before installing applications
- Added some special greetings on some certain holiday
- Added a small check if an application have been already installed, this prevents that an applications gets new installed, if its installed

Many thanks in advance!
